title: D flip flop $_DFFSR_NPP_ not defined for ICE40
body:
First off I'm a total beginner in the fpga world but I was intrigued when I found about the FOSS toolchain. Thank you for your great work.

The design that I'm trying to synthesize is the sump2 logic analyzer for the ICOBoard but I get the following error from arachne-pnr:

    top.blif:11335: fatal error: unknown model `$_DFFSR_NPP_'

After searching thought the sources  I found that $_DFFSR_NPP_  flip flop is not present for  ICE40 devices.

Is there any limitation for this module to not be present for ICE40 devices?
